name: well-architected review: records the workload description under review
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/well-architected-review.sh" --workload "secure FedRAMP-high analytics platform" --out-dir out --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out/2026-06-08T120000Z.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.workload==="secure FedRAMP-high analytics platform"?0:1)' && echo workload-ok 1>&2
